Exploring Greece places Vagia on southwest Anafi, reached by dirt road, with pebbles/rocks, no organization, and normal depth. AllOverGreece supports long deserted pebbly/rocky beach context. No services added.

TravelRecipes describes mostly sand with scattered pebbles and a difficult roughly 800 m path after leaving the vehicle. AnafiHotels supports boat-only/western remote bay context. No services added.

metadata.sourceNotes: Anafi final low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: AllOverGreece identifies Flamourou as a small south-side sandy beach near Katsouni with relatively easy path access from Kleisidi. Exploring Greece supports narrow sandy strips below rocks. Anafi walking PDF lists direct access to Flamourou from the southern coastal walking route. No services added.
